entries.definition:
r-d-ʾ support, help, backing, to bolster, to back up; to become bad, to spoil; mean, vile, base; to go beyond. Of this root, رِدْء ridʾ
356

occurs once in the Qurʾan.

رِدْء ridʾ [v. n.; n.] supporting, helping, backing; support, help; supporter, helper, backer (28:34) وَأَخِي هَارُونُ هُوَ أَفْصَحُ مِنِّي لِسَانًا فَأَرْسِلْهُ مَعِيَ رِدْءًا يُصَدِّقُنِي and my brother Aaron is far better than me in speech—send him with me, as a backer to confirm my words.

occurs once in the Qurʾan.
